overall.description: A first-person walk along a coastal beach at sunset, transitioning from sandy shoreline to rocky coast before turning inland toward a pier and beachfront buildings. The footage appears to be from a video game engine (resembling GTA V), featuring warm golden hour lighting over the ocean.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy shoreline with gentle waves lapping at the beach to the left

entered.detail: calm ocean extending to the horizon with sunset reflection
wet sand along the shoreline with gentle waves washing up
sloped terrain with dry grass and vegetation rising from the beach
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky on the hillside
low sun on the horizon casting orange and pink light across the sky and water

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sandy beach at sunset with the ocean on the left and a palm-tree lined hillside on the right. The sun sits low on the horizon casting warm orange light across the water and wet sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with tide pools

events.description: shoreline transitions from smooth sand to rocky terrain with waves washing over stones

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coast navigating over the rocky shoreline as waves wash over the stones

entered.detail: dark rocks and boulders along the waterline with waves crashing over them

segments.scene_description: The shoreline becomes rocky with waves crashing against the dark stones. The coastal hillside remains visible to the right while the sun continues to set over the ocean ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach approach with distant pier view

events.description: camera turns left toward the beach revealing a long pier and distant beachfront buildings
character's hand briefly enters the bottom of the frame

agents.ego_description: turning away from the ocean to face the beach and pier, walking over mixed rocky and sandy terrain

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the ocean with a structure at the end
multi-story beachfront buildings and hotels lining the coast

segments.scene_description: Turning inland toward the beach, a long pier extends into the water in the distance. Beachfront buildings become visible on the left as the camera moves away from the rocky hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with beachfront promenade buildings

events.description: pedestrians appear walking on the beach ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the open sand toward the illuminated beachfront buildings and other beachgoers

notable_agents.action: small group of people walking along the beach ahead near a beach fire

segments.scene_description: Walking across the wide sandy beach toward the illuminated beachfront buildings. A few pedestrians are visible ahead near a small fire, and the pier remains visible in the distance to the right while the ocean stretches behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a coastal shoreline that transitions from a serene sandy beach into a rocky coast before turning inland toward a developed beachfront. It begins with a walk along wet sand under a low, orange sunset, with the ocean to the left and a palm-tree lined hillside to the right. As the camera progresses, the soft shoreline shifts into a rugged stretch of dark stones where waves crash against the coast. The scene then turns away from the hillside and opens up toward the interior of the beach, revealing a long pier extending into the distance and buildings appearing on the left. Finally, the movement continues across the wide sand toward illuminated structures and pedestrians gathered around a small fire, with the ocean stretching out behind.
